---
title: "Player Table"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/css/jquery.dataTables.min.css">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/responsive/2.5.0/css/responsive.dataTables.min.css">

        <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.1.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/responsive/2.5.0/js/dataTables.responsive.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>
---

<style>
.table-shell {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;
  color: #111;
}

.table-toolbar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.filter-toggle-btn,
.filter-action-btn {
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  font-weight: 700;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.filter-toggle-btn {
  background: #13294b;
  color: #fff;
}

.filter-toggle-btn:hover,
.filter-action-btn:hover {
  opacity: 0.9;
}

.filter-help-text,
.filter-status {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #333;
}

.filter-status {
  margin: 10px 0 14px;
}

.filter-panel {
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border: 1px solid #d9dee3;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 16px;
  margin: 8px 0 16px;
  display: none;
}

.filter-panel.show {
  display: block;
}

.filter-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
  align-items: start;
}

.filter-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
}

.filter-group label {
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #222;
}

.filter-group input {
  padding: 9px 10px;
  border: 1px solid #c9ced6;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #111;
}

.filter-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 16px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.apply-btn {
  background: #4b9cd3;
  color: #000;
}

.reset-btn {
  background: #dfe3e8;
  color: #111;
}

.checkbox-dropdown {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
}

.checkbox-dropdown-btn {
  width: 100%;
  text-align: left;
  padding: 10px 12px;
  border: 1px solid #c9ced6;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #111;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.checkbox-dropdown-btn:hover {
  background: #f5f7fa;
}

.checkbox-dropdown-menu {
  display: none;
  position: absolute;
  top: calc(100% + 6px);
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #c9ced6;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
  z-index: 1000;
  padding: 10px;
}

.checkbox-dropdown-menu.show {
  display: block;
}

.checkbox-dropdown-search {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  border: 1px solid #c9ced6;
  border-radius: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
}

.checkbox-actions-mini {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.checkbox-mini-btn {
  border: 1px solid #c9ced6;
  background: #f8f9fa;
  color: #111;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 5px 8px;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.checkbox-options {
  max-height: 220px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  border-top: 1px solid #eef1f4;
  padding-top: 8px;
}

.checkbox-options.team-options {
  max-height: 320px;
}

.checkbox-option {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 4px 2px;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
}

.checkbox-option input {
  margin: 0;
}

#player-table-wrapper {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;
  overflow-x: auto;
  margin-top: 10px;
  display: none;
}

#player-table {
  width: 100% !important;
  border-collapse: collapse !important;
  color: #111 !important;
  background: #fff !important;
}

#player-table thead th {
  color: #111 !important;
  background: #e9ecef !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc !important;
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-weight: 700;
}

#player-table tbody td {
  color: #111 !important;
  background: #fff !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #eee !important;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

table.dataTable thead th,
table.dataTable tbody td {
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.dataTables_wrapper {
  color: #111 !important;
  width: 100% !important;
}

.dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_filter input,
.dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_length select {
  color: #111 !important;
  background: #fff !important;
}

.projection-highlight-col {
  background: #f4faff !important;
  font-weight: 700;
}

#player-table thead th.projection-highlight-col {
  background: #d9ecfb !important;
}

td.details-control {
  text-align: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #13294b;
}

td.details-control::before {
  content: "+";
  font-size: 16px;
}

tr.shown td.details-control::before {
  content: "-";
  font-size: 16px;
}

.model-card-wrap {
  padding: 14px 18px;
  background: #f8fbff;
}

.model-card {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #d9e6f2;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 18px 20px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(19, 41, 75, 0.06);
  max-width: 1050px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.model-card-top {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 18px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.model-card-title {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #13294b;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.model-card-subtitle {
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: #5b6573;
}

.model-pill-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.model-pill {
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 6px 10px;
  background: #e8f4fb;
  color: #13294b;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.model-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(230px, 1fr));
  gap: 12px;
}

.model-box {
  background: #f6f9fc;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8ef;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 12px 14px;
}

.model-box-label {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #5b6573;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}

.model-box-value {
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  line-height: 1.1;
  font-weight: 850;
  color: #111;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.model-box-note {
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  color: #4f5a67;
}

.mini-track {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  height: 10px;
  background: #d9dee3;
  border-radius: 999px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin: 8px 0 6px;
}

.mini-fill {
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #4b9cd3 0%, #13294b 100%);
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.tier-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 82px 1fr 48px;
  gap: 8px;
  align-items: center;
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  color: #3d4854;
  margin-top: 7px;
}

.tier-name {
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #13294b;
}

.bpm-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 10px;
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  color: #3d4854;
  border-top: 1px solid #e2e8ef;
  padding-top: 7px;
  margin-top: 7px;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .checkbox-dropdown-menu {
    position: static;
    margin-top: 8px;
    box-shadow: none;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="table-shell">
<div class="table-toolbar">
<button id="toggle-filters-btn" class="filter-toggle-btn">Filters</button>
<div class="filter-help-text">Choose at least one filter to load the player table.</div>
</div>
<div id="filter-panel" class="filter-panel show"></div>
<div id="filter-status" class="filter-status">Select at least one filter, then apply.</div>
<div id="player-table-wrapper">
<table id="player-table" class="display nowrap">
<thead></thead>
<tbody></tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>

<script>
let playerData = [];
let filteredPlayers = [];
let playerTable = null;

const tableColumns = [
  "player",
  "team",
  "conf",
  "class",
  "Role",
  "height",
  "GP",
  "MP",
  "PTS",
  "REB",
  "AST",
  "BPM",
  "ORTG",
  "USG",
  "TS.",
  "eFG.",
  "AST_TOV",
  "PORPAG"
];

const columnTitles = {
  player: "Player",
  team: "Team",
  conf: "Conf",
  class: "Year",
  Role: "Role",
  height: "Ht",
  GP: "GP",
  MP: "MPG",
  PTS: "PTS",
  REB: "REB",
  AST: "AST",
  BPM: "BPM",
  ORTG: "ORTG",
  USG: "USG%",
  "TS.": "TS%",
  "eFG.": "eFG%",
  AST_TOV: "AST/TO",
  PORPAG: "PORPAG"
};

function toNumber(val) {
  if (val === null || val === undefined || val === "") return 0;
  const cleaned = String(val).replace(/%/g, "").trim();
  const num = parseFloat(cleaned);
  return isNaN(num) ? 0 : num;
}

function parseOptionalNumber(val) {
  if (val === null || val === undefined || String(val).trim() === "") return null;
  const cleaned = String(val).replace(/%/g, "").trim();
  const num = parseFloat(cleaned);
  return isNaN(num) ? null : num;
}

function clamp(value, min, max) {
  return Math.min(Math.max(value, min), max);
}

function parseProbability(val) {
  if (val === null || val === undefined || val === "") return 0;
  const str = String(val).trim();
  if (str.includes("%")) return clamp(toNumber(str) / 100, 0, 1);
  const num = toNumber(str);
  if (num > 1) return clamp(num / 100, 0, 1);
  return clamp(num, 0, 1);
}

function pct1(value) {
  return `${(clamp(toNumber(value), 0, 1) * 100).toFixed(1)}%`;
}

function fmt1(value) {
  const num = parseFloat(value);
  if (isNaN(num)) return "";
  return num.toFixed(1);
}

function fmtBPM(value) {
  const num = parseFloat(value);
  if (isNaN(num)) return "-";
  return num.toFixed(1);
}

function prettifyDestinationTier(tier) {
  if (!tier) return "Unknown";
  const t = String(tier).toLowerCase().trim();
  if (t === "high" || t === "high_major" || t === "high major") return "High Major";
  if (t === "upper_mid" || t === "upper mid" || t === "upper-mid") return "Upper Mid";
  if (t === "low" || t === "low_major" || t === "low major") return "Low Major";
  return String(tier).replaceAll("_", " ").replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase());
}

function modelRiskLabel(prob) {
  if (prob >= 0.7) return "High";
  if (prob >= 0.4) return "Moderate";
  return "Low";
}

function getPrimaryDestination(row) {
  const high = row.dest_prob_high_num;
  const upper = row.dest_prob_upper_mid_num;
  const low = row.dest_prob_low_num;
  const predicted = row.pred_destination_tier && String(row.pred_destination_tier).trim() !== ""
    ? prettifyDestinationTier(row.pred_destination_tier)
    : prettifyDestinationTier(high >= upper && high >= low ? "high" : upper >= low ? "upper_mid" : "low");

  let prob = low;
  if (predicted === "High Major") prob = high;
  if (predicted === "Upper Mid") prob = upper;

  return { tier: predicted, prob };
}

function getPrimaryBpm(row) {
  const destination = getPrimaryDestination(row).tier;
  if (destination === "High Major") return { label: "High Major", value: row.pred_BPM_high };
  if (destination === "Upper Mid") return { label: "Upper Mid", value: row.pred_BPM_upper_mid };
  return { label: "Low Major", value: row.pred_BPM_low };
}

function enrichData(data) {
  return data.map(row => {
    const transfer = row.transfer_show !== undefined && row.transfer_show !== ""
      ? parseProbability(row.transfer_show)
      : parseProbability(row.transfer_prob_mean || row.pred_transfer);

    const returnProb = row.return_show !== undefined && row.return_show !== ""
      ? parseProbability(row.return_show)
      : parseProbability(row.pred_return);

    const leave = row.pred_leave !== undefined && row.pred_leave !== ""
      ? parseProbability(row.pred_leave)
      : clamp(1 - returnProb, 0, 1);

    const destHigh = parseProbability(row.dest_prob_high);
    const destUpper = parseProbability(row.dest_prob_upper_mid);
    const destLow = parseProbability(row.dest_prob_low);

    const enriched = {
      ...row,
      transfer_num: transfer,
      return_num: returnProb,
      leave_num: leave,
      dest_prob_high_num: destHigh,
      dest_prob_upper_mid_num: destUpper,
      dest_prob_low_num: destLow,
      primary_bpm_num: parseFloat(getPrimaryBpm({
        ...row,
        dest_prob_high_num: destHigh,
        dest_prob_upper_mid_num: destUpper,
        dest_prob_low_num: destLow
      }).value)
    };

    if (!enriched.destination_show || String(enriched.destination_show).trim() === "") {
      const primaryDest = getPrimaryDestination(enriched);
      enriched.destination_show = `${primaryDest.tier} (${pct1(primaryDest.prob)})`;
    }

    if (!enriched.bpm_show || String(enriched.bpm_show).trim() === "") {
      enriched.bpm_show = fmtBPM(enriched.primary_bpm_num);
    }

    return enriched;
  });
}

function getCheckedValues(filterName) {
  return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(`input[name="${filterName}"]:checked`))
    .map(input => input.value);
}

function uniqueSortedValues(data, key) {
  return [...new Set(
    data.map(row => row[key]).filter(v => v !== null && v !== undefined && String(v).trim() !== "")
  )].sort((a, b) => String(a).localeCompare(String(b)));
}

function orderedValues(data, key, preferredOrder) {
  const values = [...new Set(
    data.map(row => row[key]).filter(v => v !== null && v !== undefined && String(v).trim() !== "")
  )];

  const preferredPresent = preferredOrder.filter(item => values.includes(item));
  const remaining = values
    .filter(item => !preferredOrder.includes(item))
    .sort((a, b) => String(a).localeCompare(String(b)));

  return [...preferredPresent, ...remaining];
}

function createCheckboxDropdown({
  id,
  label,
  values,
  buttonText,
  searchPlaceholder = "Search...",
  large = false
}) {
  const optionsHtml = values.map(value => `
    <label class="checkbox-option" data-value="${String(value).toLowerCase()}">
      <input type="checkbox" name="${id}" value="${value}">
      <span>${value}</span>
    </label>
  `).join("");

  return `
    <div class="filter-group">
      <label>${label}</label>
      <div class="checkbox-dropdown" id="${id}-dropdown">
        <button type="button" class="checkbox-dropdown-btn" id="${id}-btn">${buttonText}</button>
        <div class="checkbox-dropdown-menu" id="${id}-menu">
          <input type="text" class="checkbox-dropdown-search" id="${id}-search" placeholder="${searchPlaceholder}">
          <div class="checkbox-actions-mini">
            <button type="button" class="checkbox-mini-btn" data-action="select-all" data-target="${id}">Select All</button>
            <button type="button" class="checkbox-mini-btn" data-action="clear-all" data-target="${id}">Clear</button>
          </div>
          <div class="checkbox-options ${large ? "team-options" : ""}" id="${id}-options">
            ${optionsHtml}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
}

function updateDropdownButtonText(filterName, defaultText) {
  const checked = getCheckedValues(filterName);
  const btn = document.getElementById(`${filterName}-btn`);
  if (!btn) return;
  if (checked.length === 0) btn.textContent = defaultText;
  else if (checked.length <= 2) btn.textContent = checked.join(", ");
  else btn.textContent = `${checked.length} selected`;
}

function setupCheckboxDropdown(filterName, defaultText) {
  const btn = document.getElementById(`${filterName}-btn`);
  const menu = document.getElementById(`${filterName}-menu`);
  const search = document.getElementById(`${filterName}-search`);
  const optionsWrap = document.getElementById(`${filterName}-options`);

  btn.addEventListener("click", function(e) {
    e.stopPropagation();
    document.querySelectorAll(".checkbox-dropdown-menu.show").forEach(openMenu => {
      if (openMenu !== menu) openMenu.classList.remove("show");
    });
    menu.classList.toggle("show");
  });

  search.addEventListener("input", function() {
    const term = this.value.toLowerCase().trim();
    optionsWrap.querySelectorAll(".checkbox-option").forEach(option => {
      const value = option.getAttribute("data-value");
      option.style.display = value.includes(term) ? "flex" : "none";
    });
  });

  optionsWrap.querySelectorAll(`input[name="${filterName}"]`).forEach(input => {
    input.addEventListener("change", function() {
      updateDropdownButtonText(filterName, defaultText);
    });
  });
}

function numericFilterIds() {
  return [
    "gp-min-filter",
    "pts-min-filter",
    "mp-min-filter",
    "bpm-min-filter",
    "transfer-min-filter",
    "leave-min-filter",
    "dest-prob-min-filter",
    "proj-bpm-min-filter",
    "proj-bpm-max-filter"
  ];
}

function hasAtLeastOneFilter() {
  const selectedCounts = [
    getCheckedValues("team-filter").length,
    getCheckedValues("conf-filter").length,
    getCheckedValues("role-filter").length,
    getCheckedValues("year-filter").length,
    getCheckedValues("destination-filter").length
  ];

  const hasCheckbox = selectedCounts.some(count => count > 0);
  const hasNumeric = numericFilterIds().some(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    return el && String(el.value).trim() !== "";
  });

  return hasCheckbox || hasNumeric;
}

function renderFilterUI() {
  const filterPanel = document.getElementById("filter-panel");
  const teams = uniqueSortedValues(playerData, "team");
  const confs = uniqueSortedValues(playerData, "conf");
  const roles = orderedValues(playerData, "Role", ["Pure PG", "Scoring PG", "Combo G", "Wing G", "Wing F", "Stretch 4", "PF/C"]);
  const years = orderedValues(playerData, "class", ["Fr", "So", "Jr", "Sr"]);
  const destinations = orderedValues(
    playerData.map(row => ({ tier: getPrimaryDestination(row).tier })),
    "tier",
    ["High Major", "Upper Mid", "Low Major"]
  );

  filterPanel.innerHTML = `
    <div class="filter-grid">
      ${createCheckboxDropdown({
        id: "team-filter",
        label: "Team",
        values: teams,
        buttonText: "Select team(s)",
        searchPlaceholder: "Search teams...",
        large: true
      })}

      ${createCheckboxDropdown({
        id: "conf-filter",
        label: "Conference",
        values: confs,
        buttonText: "Select conference(s)",
        searchPlaceholder: "Search conferences..."
      })}

      ${createCheckboxDropdown({
        id: "role-filter",
        label: "Role",
        values: roles,
        buttonText: "Select role(s)",
        searchPlaceholder: "Search roles..."
      })}

      ${createCheckboxDropdown({
        id: "year-filter",
        label: "Year",
        values: years,
        buttonText: "Select year(s)",
        searchPlaceholder: "Search years..."
      })}

      ${createCheckboxDropdown({
        id: "destination-filter",
        label: "Projected Destination",
        values: destinations,
        buttonText: "Select tier(s)",
        searchPlaceholder: "Search tiers..."
      })}

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="gp-min-filter">Min GP</label>
        <input type="number" id="gp-min-filter" min="0" placeholder="e.g. 10">
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="pts-min-filter">Min PTS</label>
        <input type="number" id="pts-min-filter" min="0" step="0.1" placeholder="e.g. 8">
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="mp-min-filter">Min MP</label>
        <input type="number" id="mp-min-filter" min="0" step="0.1" placeholder="e.g. 15">
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="bpm-min-filter">Min BPM</label>
        <input type="number" id="bpm-min-filter" step="0.1" placeholder="e.g. 2">
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="transfer-min-filter">Min Transfer %</label>
        <input type="number" id="transfer-min-filter" min="0" max="100" step="1" placeholder="e.g. 50">
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="leave-min-filter">Min Leave %</label>
        <input type="number" id="leave-min-filter" min="0" max="100" step="1" placeholder="e.g. 50">
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="dest-prob-min-filter">Min Destination Confidence %</label>
        <input type="number" id="dest-prob-min-filter" min="0" max="100" step="1" placeholder="e.g. 45">
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="proj-bpm-min-filter">Min Projected BPM</label>
        <input type="number" id="proj-bpm-min-filter" step="0.1" placeholder="e.g. 1">
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label for="proj-bpm-max-filter">Max Projected BPM</label>
        <input type="number" id="proj-bpm-max-filter" step="0.1" placeholder="e.g. 8">
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="filter-actions">
      <button id="apply-filters-btn" class="filter-action-btn apply-btn">Apply Filters</button>
      <button id="reset-filters-btn" class="filter-action-btn reset-btn">Reset Filters</button>
    </div>
  `;

  [
    ["team-filter", "Select team(s)"],
    ["conf-filter", "Select conference(s)"],
    ["role-filter", "Select role(s)"],
    ["year-filter", "Select year(s)"],
    ["destination-filter", "Select tier(s)"]
  ].forEach(([id, label]) => setupCheckboxDropdown(id, label));

  document.querySelectorAll(".checkbox-mini-btn").forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener("click", function() {
      const target = this.dataset.target;
      const action = this.dataset.action;
      document.querySelectorAll(`input[name="${target}"]`).forEach(box => {
        if (action === "select-all") box.checked = true;
        if (action === "clear-all") box.checked = false;
      });

      const defaultMap = {
        "team-filter": "Select team(s)",
        "conf-filter": "Select conference(s)",
        "role-filter": "Select role(s)",
        "year-filter": "Select year(s)",
        "destination-filter": "Select tier(s)"
      };

      updateDropdownButtonText(target, defaultMap[target]);
    });
  });

  document.getElementById("apply-filters-btn").addEventListener("click", applyFilters);
  document.getElementById("reset-filters-btn").addEventListener("click", resetFilters);

  document.addEventListener("click", function(e) {
    if (!e.target.closest(".checkbox-dropdown")) {
      document.querySelectorAll(".checkbox-dropdown-menu.show").forEach(menu => {
        menu.classList.remove("show");
      });
    }
  });
}

function getNumericInput(id) {
  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  return el ? parseOptionalNumber(el.value) : null;
}

function applyFilters() {
  const status = document.getElementById("filter-status");
  const wrapper = document.getElementById("player-table-wrapper");

  if (!hasAtLeastOneFilter()) {
    filteredPlayers = [];
    wrapper.style.display = "none";
    status.textContent = "Select at least one filter, then apply.";
    if (playerTable) {
      playerTable.clear().draw();
    }
    return;
  }

  const selectedTeams = getCheckedValues("team-filter");
  const selectedConfs = getCheckedValues("conf-filter");
  const selectedRoles = getCheckedValues("role-filter");
  const selectedYears = getCheckedValues("year-filter");
  const selectedDestinations = getCheckedValues("destination-filter");

  const minGP = getNumericInput("gp-min-filter");
  const minPTS = getNumericInput("pts-min-filter");
  const minMP = getNumericInput("mp-min-filter");
  const minBPM = getNumericInput("bpm-min-filter");
  const minTransfer = getNumericInput("transfer-min-filter");
  const minLeave = getNumericInput("leave-min-filter");
  const minDestProb = getNumericInput("dest-prob-min-filter");
  const minProjectedBPM = getNumericInput("proj-bpm-min-filter");
  const maxProjectedBPM = getNumericInput("proj-bpm-max-filter");

  filteredPlayers = playerData.filter(row => {
    const primaryDest = getPrimaryDestination(row);
    const primaryBpm = getPrimaryBpm(row);
    const primaryBpmNum = parseFloat(primaryBpm.value);

    const teamMatch = selectedTeams.length === 0 || selectedTeams.includes(row.team);
    const confMatch = selectedConfs.length === 0 || selectedConfs.includes(row.conf);
    const roleMatch = selectedRoles.length === 0 || selectedRoles.includes(row.Role);
    const yearMatch = selectedYears.length === 0 || selectedYears.includes(row.class);
    const destMatch = selectedDestinations.length === 0 || selectedDestinations.includes(primaryDest.tier);

    const gpMatch = minGP === null || toNumber(row.GP) >= minGP;
    const ptsMatch = minPTS === null || toNumber(row.PTS) >= minPTS;
    const mpMatch = minMP === null || toNumber(row.MP) >= minMP;
    const bpmMatch = minBPM === null || toNumber(row.BPM) >= minBPM;
    const transferMatch = minTransfer === null || row.transfer_num >= minTransfer / 100;
    const leaveMatch = minLeave === null || row.leave_num >= minLeave / 100;
    const destProbMatch = minDestProb === null || primaryDest.prob >= minDestProb / 100;
    const projectedMinMatch = minProjectedBPM === null || (!isNaN(primaryBpmNum) && primaryBpmNum >= minProjectedBPM);
    const projectedMaxMatch = maxProjectedBPM === null || (!isNaN(primaryBpmNum) && primaryBpmNum <= maxProjectedBPM);

    return teamMatch && confMatch && roleMatch && yearMatch && destMatch &&
      gpMatch && ptsMatch && mpMatch && bpmMatch && transferMatch && leaveMatch &&
      destProbMatch && projectedMinMatch && projectedMaxMatch;
  });

  wrapper.style.display = "block";
  status.textContent = `${filteredPlayers.length.toLocaleString()} players match the active filters. Sort by any column or expand a player for model details.`;
  buildTable(filteredPlayers);
}

function resetFilters() {
  ["team-filter", "conf-filter", "role-filter", "year-filter", "destination-filter"].forEach(filterName => {
    document.querySelectorAll(`input[name="${filterName}"]`).forEach(box => {
      box.checked = false;
    });
  });

  numericFilterIds().forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.value = "";
  });

  updateDropdownButtonText("team-filter", "Select team(s)");
  updateDropdownButtonText("conf-filter", "Select conference(s)");
  updateDropdownButtonText("role-filter", "Select role(s)");
  updateDropdownButtonText("year-filter", "Select year(s)");
  updateDropdownButtonText("destination-filter", "Select tier(s)");

  filteredPlayers = [];
  document.getElementById("player-table-wrapper").style.display = "none";
  document.getElementById("filter-status").textContent = "Select at least one filter, then apply.";
  if (playerTable) {
    playerTable.clear().draw();
  }
}

function miniBar(value) {
  const pct = clamp(toNumber(value), 0, 1) * 100;
  return `<div class="mini-track"><div class="mini-fill" style="width:${pct}%;"></div></div>`;
}

function tierRow(label, value) {
  return `
    <div class="tier-row">
      <div class="tier-name">${label}</div>
      ${miniBar(value)}
      <div>${pct1(value)}</div>
    </div>
  `;
}

function formatModelDetails(row) {
  const primaryDest = getPrimaryDestination(row);
  const primaryBpm = getPrimaryBpm(row);
  const transfer = row.transfer_num;
  const leave = row.leave_num;
  const returnProb = row.return_num;

  return `
    <div class="model-card-wrap">
      <div class="model-card">
        <div class="model-card-top">
          <div>
            <div class="model-card-title">${row.player}</div>
            <div class="model-card-subtitle">${row.team} | ${row.conf} | ${row.class || ""} | ${row.Role || ""}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="model-pill-row">
            <span class="model-pill">${fmt1(row.PTS)} PTS</span>
            <span class="model-pill">${fmt1(row.REB)} REB</span>
            <span class="model-pill">${fmt1(row.AST)} AST</span>
            <span class="model-pill">${fmtBPM(row.BPM)} BPM</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="model-grid">
          <div class="model-box">
            <div class="model-box-label">Transfer Model</div>
            <div class="model-box-value">${pct1(transfer)}</div>
            ${miniBar(transfer)}
            <div class="model-box-note">${modelRiskLabel(transfer)} transfer likelihood</div>
          </div>

          <div class="model-box">
            <div class="model-box-label">Return / Leave Model</div>
            <div class="model-box-value">${pct1(returnProb)} return</div>
            ${miniBar(returnProb)}
            <div class="model-box-note">${pct1(leave)} leave probability</div>
          </div>

          <div class="model-box">
            <div class="model-box-label">Destination Model</div>
            <div class="model-box-value">${primaryDest.tier}</div>
            <div class="model-box-note">${pct1(primaryDest.prob)} confidence in selected tier</div>
            ${tierRow("High", row.dest_prob_high_num)}
            ${tierRow("Upper", row.dest_prob_upper_mid_num)}
            ${tierRow("Low", row.dest_prob_low_num)}
          </div>

          <div class="model-box">
            <div class="model-box-label">Projected BPM Model</div>
            <div class="model-box-value">${fmtBPM(primaryBpm.value)}</div>
            <div class="model-box-note">Primary projection for ${primaryBpm.label}</div>
            <div class="bpm-row"><span>Low Major</span><strong>${fmtBPM(row.pred_BPM_low)}</strong></div>
            <div class="bpm-row"><span>Upper Mid</span><strong>${fmtBPM(row.pred_BPM_upper_mid)}</strong></div>
            <div class="bpm-row"><span>High Major</span><strong>${fmtBPM(row.pred_BPM_high)}</strong></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
}

function buildTable(dataToUse) {
  const validCols = tableColumns.filter(col =>
    dataToUse.length === 0 || Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(playerData[0], col)
  );

  const columns = [
    {
      className: "details-control",
      orderable: false,
      data: null,
      defaultContent: "",
      title: "",
      width: "30px"
    },
    ...validCols.map(col => ({
      title: columnTitles[col] || col,
      data: col,
      defaultContent: "",
      className: "",
      render: function(data, type, row) {
        if (["MP", "PTS", "REB", "AST", "BPM", "ORTG", "USG", "TS.", "eFG.", "AST_TOV", "PORPAG"].includes(col)) {
          if (type === "sort" || type === "type") return toNumber(data);
          return fmt1(data);
        }
        if (type !== "display" && type !== "filter") return data;
        return data;
      }
    }))
  ];

  if (playerTable) {
    playerTable.destroy();
    $("#player-table").empty();
  }

  playerTable = $("#player-table").DataTable({
    data: dataToUse,
    columns: columns,
    pageLength: 25,
    responsive: false,
    scrollX: true,
    order: [[9, "desc"]],
    autoWidth: true,
    deferRender: true
  });

  $("#player-table tbody").off("click", "td.details-control");
  $("#player-table tbody").on("click", "td.details-control", function() {
    const tr = $(this).closest("tr");
    const row = playerTable.row(tr);

    if (row.child.isShown()) {
      row.child.hide();
      tr.removeClass("shown");
    } else {
      row.child(formatModelDetails(row.data())).show();
      tr.addClass("shown");
    }
  });
}

document.getElementById("toggle-filters-btn").addEventListener("click", function() {
  document.getElementById("filter-panel").classList.toggle("show");
});

Papa.parse("data/complete_2026_scored.csv", {
  download: true,
  header: true,
  skipEmptyLines: true,
  complete: function(results) {
    playerData = enrichData(results.data);

    if (!playerData || playerData.length === 0) {
      document.getElementById("filter-status").textContent = "No data loaded.";
      return;
    }

    renderFilterUI();
  },
  error: function(error) {
    document.getElementById("filter-status").textContent = "Error loading data.";
    console.error(error);
  }
});
</script>
